mapper.select: SELECT a.surveyno, a.surveydate, a.userkey, a.skin_scroe, a.skin_gomin, a.iscomplexity, a.t_zone_result, a.t_zone_position_num, a.u_zone_result, a.u_zone_position_num, a.fizpatrick_color_point, a.solution_type_number, b.description as solution_type_result, b.memo as solution_type_tip, a.sensitive_type_number, c.description as sensitive_type_result, a.solution_type_number, c.memo as sensitive_type_tip, a.specialtip_img, a.specialtip_stoke_img, a.specialtip_memo FROM skins.citylab_result_rpt a LEFT JOIN skins.tb_code b on b.cd_id = a.solution_type_number and b.group_cd = 'MEASURE_SKIN_RESULT' LEFT JOIN skins.tb_code c on cd.cd_id = a.sensitive_type_number and c.group_cd = 'MEASURE_SENS_RESULT' WHERE userkey = #{userKey} ORDER BY surveydate
